productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Puma Flips Blue Flip Flops
description: When the heart desires utmost style and comfort, you shouldn't deprive it of such pleasure! These flip-flops from puma offer a fantastic look coupled with unbelievable all-day comfort. If you want to look awesome and feel great, they are your best bet. Team them with jeans or shorts for a perfectly relaxed look. It was never easier to look spectacular, cool and so wow! Upper Wide, synthetic straps in thong style for durability and comfort Fabric toe separator for more comfort and moisture-absorption Brand tab near the toe separator Logo printed on the strap Midsole EVA midsole for better shock absorption and lightweight comfort Cushioned footbed for all-day comfort Branding on footbed Outsole TPR outsole for better shock absorption and durability Round suction points all over the outsole for better traction on all surfaces shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash Do not store in direct sunlight
